name: Church Street Courts
description: Church Street Courts is a place to play pickleball in Abingdon, VA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like water and lights.

name: Harry L. Coomes Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Harry L. Coomes Recreation Center in Abingdon, VA! There are 4 hard courts. 1 is indoors and 3 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, lights, and water.
